title: SumSub Forgery client reset
description: How to check a Forgery rejection in SumSub and reset the client's verification if reset is required.
when_to_use: Use this process when a client is rejected in SumSub with a Forgery reject label and you need to check the reason, review the submitted document, and reset the applicant if needed.

steps.title: Open Applicants - Individuals
steps.text:
In SumSub, open the left-side navigation menu.

Go to:

```text
Applicants → Individuals
```

This section is used to search and open individual client profiles.

steps.title: Search for the client
steps.text:
Enter the client ID in the search bar at the top of the Individuals page.

Make sure the client appears in the search results and that the Review status is Rejected.

Also check that the Reject label is Forgery.

steps.title: Check Notes
steps.text:
Open the client profile and check the Notes section.

The note usually contains a short explanation of the Forgery reason.

Example:

```text
Material → Polycarbonate / Laminated Layers → Document printed on plain plastic
```

Use this note to understand what exactly triggered the rejection.

steps.title: Generate and review AI overview
Check the document marked as Forgery
steps.text:
Go to the Documents section.

Open the document that has the Forgery label.

Forgery can be detected on different document types, for example:

- Identity document;
- Proof of address;
- other submitted documents.

Review the document and the rejection message. Check whether it is possible to independently confirm that the document is genuine or whether the Forgery reason cannot be resolved manually.

steps.title: Open the applicant action menu
steps.text:
If reset is required, go to the top action panel of the applicant page.

Find the three-dot menu next to Change applicant status.

Click the three-dot menu to open additional applicant actions.

steps.title: Select Reset applicant
steps.text:
In the dropdown menu, select:

```text
Reset applicant
```

This action starts the applicant reset flow and allows the client to pass verification again.

steps.title: Confirm reset
steps.text:
A confirmation window will appear.

Read the warning carefully. SumSub warns that the applicant was finally blocked by the system and that resetting suspicious documents can create additional risks.

If reset is still required according to the internal process, click:

```text
Reset applicant
```

After reset, the client will be able to pass verification again in the Members Area.

title: SOF thresholds
description: Table with SOW/SOF request thresholds by payment system, bank, card, or payment provider.
when_to_use: Use this process when you need to check from which amount SOW/SOF should be requested for a specific payment system or provider.

steps.title: Check the SOF/SOW threshold table
steps.text: Find the relevant payment system, bank, card, or provider in the table and check the overall amount to request SOW/SOF.

title: Third-party Deposits Check
when_to_use: Use this process to review third-party deposits, check refund availability, verify KYC, determine whether TPD documents are required, and send the appropriate ticket to the client.

steps.title: Identify the client source
steps.text:
TPD processing is performed on a daily basis.

Clients can come from two sources:

- TPD table — the main source for processing. New clients are added by Antifraud when new cases are detected.

- Teams channel RF AML - Payments BZ — additional source where the Payments team may ask to process a specific client.

Example Teams notification:

```text
Привет, 14398323 пополнение ТПД 100 % Payabl (Visa) BZ 1010 USD 440043******1839
```

steps.title: Verify third-party deposit amount
steps.text:
Take the Client ID from the TPD table or Teams notification and verify the actual TPD in CRM.

Open CRM → IN/OUT → Operations.

You can check it by:

- searching for the Autodeposit operation with the third-party card;

- opening any Withdrawal request, which is usually more convenient.

In Withdrawal request, review the Payment details of the depositing table at the bottom of the page. Third-party deposits are highlighted in red.

Pay attention to:

- Deposit Amount (USD)

- Available for refund

steps.title: Check refund availability
steps.text:
Make sure the client can perform a refund from the Members Area.

Open the client's Members Area using backdoor access or click Go to members area from the Withdrawal request page or client card in CRM.

Select Limited and click Proceed.

Then go to:

```text
Funds → Withdraw funds → VISA/MasterCard (Refund) → Go to
```

In Select your payment card, find the third-party card and confirm that refund is available.

This is important because later we may need to instruct the client to make the refund independently, without requesting a manual refund from Payments.

steps.title: Check KYC
steps.text:
Check the client's KYC documents.

Documents must be valid at the moment of review.

If one or more documents are expired, include a valid KYC request in the ticket to the client.

steps.title: Check payment system threshold
Request TPD documents if threshold is exceeded
Power of Attorney template
steps.text:
```text
I, the sender of the funds________________________ (Name, Surname), ID/Passport Number ____________________ agreed to transfer the amount of funds from my personal payment details with the number: __________________________________________ to my ______________________________(relation who is the owner of members area to third party), __________________________________(Name, Surname), the receiver, on his/her trading account(s): _______________________________________ on RoboForex Ltd. Company. I authorize the receiver to use the deposited funds, by his/her own will, on his/her trading account(s). The receiver can perform any trading, transfer, withdrawal of funds with the deposited amount without any restrictions from my side. I do not have any intent in using or returning the deposited funds. Also, I do understand that the company does not compensate for losses incurred due to the forced closing of positions on the client’s account. I agree with all internal policies of receiver RoboForex Ltd. company, and I do not have any claims concerning the rules of removal of funds. RoboForex Ltd cannot under any circumstances be held liable for any conditions coming from my consent to trust the funds to the receiver.

Sender (Name, Surname): _____________________________
Date: _____________________________________________
Signature: __________________________________________
```

steps.title: Check chargeback timeframe
Send ticket to the client
steps.text:
After determining the request type, use the Compliance request templates application.

Use one of the following templates:

- TPD informing

- TPD informing + KYC

- TPD docs request

- TPD docs request + KYC

The application helps generate the message by selecting the request type, entering the client name, number of third-party cards/accounts, card/account number, and third-party name.

Send the ticket with subject:

```text
Notice Regarding Third-Party Account Usage
```

Use folder:

```text
BZ EN Deposit requests
```

steps.title: Repeated violations
steps.text: If the client ignores warnings about third-party payment details multiple times, the client may be terminated after several warnings.
